author: Aditya Sasidhar
name: 11L GQA + MLP 3 + Partial RoPE + Int6 Attn/MLP + QAT40
blurb: Compact GPT-style run with tied embeddings, GQA (8 query heads / 4 KV heads), Partial RoPE on 16 dims, XSA on the last 4 layers, FlashAttention-compatible SDPA, and MLP 3x width. Training uses Muon + AdamW with weight decay, 20-step warmup, wallclock-based LR warmdown over the final 15%, and late QAT over the final 40% of training. Evaluation uses sliding-window validation with stride 96. Export uses mixed low-bit quantization with real packed int6 for MLP fc/proj and attention q/k/v/proj weights, passthrough control tensors, and zlib compression.
